shortDescription: Stylish 4-bedroom semi-detached in Davisville Village blending Victorian charm with contemporary living.
fullDescription: Welcome to 88 Davisville Avenue in the vibrant Davisville Village neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The 4 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: In-suite laundry with full-size washer and dryer
Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
